title: Part 4 – Exposé : bulletin météo pour voyageurs d'affaires
instructions: Écoutez le bulletin, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Good morning, here is the business travel weather update for this week. Travelers heading to Tokyo should expect clear skies and mild temperatures in the mid-twenties Celsius, ideal conditions for the trade fair. Those traveling to London should pack a rain jacket, as heavy showers are expected throughout the week with temperatures around twelve degrees. For travelers to Dubai, temperatures will reach forty degrees by midday, so light clothing and sun protection are strongly advised. Our next update will air tomorrow morning at six o'clock. Have a safe journey.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this broadcast?
choices: To give a weather update for business travelers
questions.explanation: "here is the business travel weather update for this week" indique clairement l'objectif.

questions.prompt: What weather is expected in London?
questions.explanation: "heavy showers are expected throughout the week with temperatures around twelve degrees".

questions.prompt: What are travelers to Dubai advised to bring?
questions.explanation: "light clothing and sun protection are strongly advised" pour Dubai.
